title: Pukka Pad, A4 Metallic Jotta Book 3 Pack – 21 x 30cm – Wirebound Notebook with 8mm Lines and 80GSM Paper – Features 4-Hole Punch Margins and Perforated Edges - 200 Pages, Green
features: Fashionable Metallic Covers: The Pukka Pad Metallic Notebooks come in sets of three with fashionable metallic colours so you can stay stylish while you organise your school subjects
A4+ Page Perforation: Each book features A4+ sized pages that tear out easily along the perforated lines, great for shopping lists or leaving important memos
4-Hole Punch Margins: Even once you tear out your pages, you can keep them stored and sorted in your binder with the pre-hole-punched margins

FSC Certified: These notebooks are FSC certified, ensuring that the products have been sourced from responsibly managed forests as outlined by the non-profit Forest Stewardship Council, dedicated to environmentally and socially conscious production standards
Product Details: The Pukka Pad A4+ Jotta Book features metallic card back covers and 200, 8mm line, 80GSM pages, ideal for school subjects, home organization, or office projects
description: From the manufacturer Premium Quality No Bleed Paper These notebooks use superior quality, bright, 80 GSM paper, allowing you to use a variety of pens without bleeding, ghosting, or leaking through to the other side. A4 Page Perforation Each book features A4 sized pages that tear out easily along the perforated lines, great leaving important memos around the house or taking your grocery lists to the store Durable Twin Binding These sturdy, stylish, and versatile notebooks include durable twin binding and are fantastic for organizing work projects, course work, or event planning.
